name: Retail Account Opening
description: Open a new retail bank account including KYC, eligibility checks, and account activation.

name: Card Dispute / Chargeback
description: Handle card transaction disputes, evidence collection, and chargeback submission/decisioning.

name: Personal Loan Application
description: End-to-end personal loan application from intake to underwriting and disbursement.

name: Retail Account Closure
description: Close a retail account including balance checks, pending transactions review, and final confirmation.
